response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable open-source contributions and deep systems thinking, but lacks explicit, recent, or deep enterprise JVM tooling experience — his Java exposure is minimal and buried in older roles, with no clear evidence of Spring, build tools, or IDE internals work required for this role.
strengths: Strong systems-level thinking and cross-stack experience
Active open-source contributor with tooling and infrastructure projects
Proven ability to learn and ship complex technical systems across domains
concerns: Minimal recent Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience
No demonstrated work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM tooling
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-focused
